languages.text: "Капитан Зораэль из {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караула Смерти{/g}". {n}Астартес смотрит на вас с горькой тяжестью во взгляде, скупо роняя слова.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Капитан Виктус из {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караула Смерти{/g}". {n}Космодесантник смотрит на вас с горькой тяжестью во взгляде, скупо роняя слова.{/n}

languages.text: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Капитан Зораэль из {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караула Смерти{/g}". {n}Астартес смотрит на вас с горькой тяжестью во взгляде, скупо роняя слова.{/n}

languages.text: 「死の監視隊のヴィクトス大佐」{n}このスペースマリーンは、重苦しく苦い視線であなたを見つめ、惜しげもなく言葉を紡ぎ出す.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain Victus of the Deathwatch." {n}The Space Marine looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「死の監視隊のヴィクトス大佐」{n}このスペースマリーンは、重苦しく苦い視線であなたを見つめ、惜しげもなく言葉を紡ぎ出す.{/n}

languages.text: «Capitán Zorael, de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}», {n}dice el Astartes con reticencia, mirándote con amargura.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Capitán Zorael, de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}», {n}dice el Astartes con reticencia, mirándote con amargura.{/n}

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}，佐拉尔连长。”{n}阿斯塔特沉重而苦涩地注视着你，每个字都说得吝啬而勉强。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}，佐拉尔连长。”{n}阿斯塔特沉重而苦涩地注视着你，每个字都说得吝啬而勉强。{/n}

languages.text: "Captain Zorael von der {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}Der Astartes sieht dich mit leidvoller Miene an und stößt jedes Wort nur zögerlich hervor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Captain Zorael von der {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}Der Astartes sieht dich mit leidvoller Miene an und stößt jedes Wort nur zögerlich hervor.{/n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'nden{/g} Yüzbaşı Zorael." {n}Astartes sana ağır, acı bir ifadeyle bakıyor ve her bir kelimeyi cimri bir isteksizlikle söylüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'nden{/g} Yüzbaşı Zorael." {n}Astartes sana ağır, acı bir ifadeyle bakıyor ve her bir kelimeyi cimri bir isteksizlikle söylüyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Capitaine Zorael de la {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. » {n}Le membre de l'Astartes vous adresse un regard lourd d'amertume. Chaque mot est prononcé avec réticence, comme s'il lui en coûtait d'en dire plus.{/n}
